accurate.why: All claims—the CRA basis, EPA as issuing agency, the rule title, Nov. 18, 2024 Federal Register publication, the nullification effect, and Mar. 14, 2025 approval—are supported by the bill text or verifiable context.

no_hallucinations.why: The 'Congressional Review Act' name is accurate context for chapter 8 of title 5, and no claim is fabricated or contradicts the bill.

states_purpose.why: The summary clearly identifies the bill's purpose as disapproving and nullifying the EPA Waste Emissions Charge rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The summary correctly explains the rule is nullified and notes the resolution does not amend other statutory provisions or create replacement procedures.

exceptions_conditions.why: This one-sentence disapproval resolution contains no material exceptions, conditions, or carve-outs to summarize.

effective_dates.why: The summary correctly notes the resolution was approved March 14, 2025.

major_provisions_covered.why: The summary captures the bill's sole operative effect: disapproving the EPA rule so it has no force or effect.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and free of advocacy or editorializing.

coherent.why: The summary is well-organized, internally consistent, and reads clearly.

concise.why: The summary is brief and free of padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: The Environmental Protection Agency, the rule title, and the Congressional Review Act are all identified correctly.

correct_figures.why: The two dates stated—November 18, 2024 publication and March 14, 2025 approval—are both correct.
